destinations.name: Serengeti National Park
destinations.description: Home of the Great Migration and endless plains.

destinations.name: Ngorongoro Crater
destinations.description: A UNESCO World Heritage site and natural wonder.

destinations.name: Zanzibar
destinations.description: White-sand beaches and turquoise waters.

destinations.name: Tarangire National Park
destinations.description: Famous for elephant herds and baobab trees.

destinations.name: Mount Kilimanjaro
destinations.description: Africa's highest peak and premier trekking destination.

destinations.name: Maasai Mara National Reserve
destinations.description: Northern extension of the Serengeti, iconic for big cats.

destinations.name: Amboseli National Park
destinations.description: Large elephant herds with Kilimanjaro views.

destinations.name: Lamu Old Town
destinations.description: Oldest, best-preserved Swahili settlement in East Africa.

destinations.name: Bwindi Impenetrable Forest
destinations.description: UNESCO site critical for mountain gorilla conservation.

destinations.name: Volcanoes National Park
destinations.description: Home to rare mountain gorillas, site of Dian Fossey's research.

destinations.name: Table Mountain
destinations.description: Cape Town's iconic flat-topped mountain.

destinations.name: Kruger National Park
destinations.description: One of Africa's largest and most famous game reserves.

destinations.name: Victoria Falls
destinations.description: One of the world's largest and most famous waterfalls.

destinations.name: Okavango Delta
destinations.description: World's largest inland river delta, mokoro safaris.

destinations.name: Sossusvlei (Namib Desert)
destinations.description: World's highest and most iconic red sand dunes.

destinations.name: Pyramids of Giza
destinations.description: Ancient wonders of the world, iconic landmarks of Egypt.

destinations.name: Valley of the Kings
destinations.description: Tombs constructed for Pharaohs and nobles of the New Kingdom.

destinations.name: Marrakesh (The Red City)
destinations.description: Vibrant city known for its souks and historic medina.

destinations.name: Sahara Desert
destinations.description: World's largest hot desert.

destinations.name: Seychelles Islands
destinations.description: Archipelago known for pristine beaches and granite boulders.

destinations.name: Chobe National Park
destinations.description: Riverfront park famed for having Africa's largest elephant population.

destinations.name: Etosha National Park
destinations.description: Vast salt pan surrounded by waterholes drawing huge herds of wildlife.

destinations.name: Skeleton Coast
destinations.description: Fog-shrouded shipwreck coastline and remote desert wilderness.

destinations.name: Fes (Fez Medina)
destinations.description: The world's largest car-free urban area, home to ancient tanneries and madrasas.

destinations.name: Essaouira
destinations.description: Breezy Atlantic port town with a walled medina and windsurfing beaches.

destinations.name: Karnak Temple (Luxor)
destinations.description: Massive temple complex on the east bank of the Nile at Luxor.

destinations.name: Robben Island
destinations.description: UNESCO site and former prison where Nelson Mandela was held.

destinations.name: Blyde River Canyon
destinations.description: One of the largest canyons on Earth, with dramatic viewpoints along the Panorama Route.

destinations.name: Diani Beach
destinations.description: Powder-white beach on Kenya's south coast, popular for kite-surfing.

destinations.name: Ol Pejeta Conservancy
destinations.description: Leading rhino sanctuary and home to the last northern white rhinos.

destinations.name: Lake Malawi
destinations.description: Africa's third-largest lake, prized for diving, snorkeling, and freshwater beaches.

destinations.name: Simien Mountains National Park
destinations.description: Dramatic escarpments and jagged peaks, home to the endemic gelada monkey.

destinations.name: Cape Town City & Waterfront
destinations.description: Cosmopolitan coastal capital blending Table Mountain views, beaches, and vibrant harbor life.

destinations.name: Cape Winelands (Stellenbosch & Franschhoek)
destinations.description: Historic Cape Dutch estates set among vineyards and mountain valleys.

destinations.name: Garden Route
destinations.description: Scenic coastal drive through forests, lagoons, and beach towns.

destinations.name: Addo Elephant National Park
destinations.description: Malaria-free reserve protecting one of the densest elephant populations in Africa.

destinations.name: Hermanus
destinations.description: Coastal town renowned as one of the best land-based whale-watching spots on Earth.

destinations.name: Drakensberg Mountains
destinations.description: Dramatic UNESCO-listed escarpment with ancient San rock art and top hiking trails.

destinations.name: Nairobi National Park
destinations.description: The only national park bordering a capital city, with rhinos and lions minutes from downtown.

destinations.name: Samburu National Reserve
destinations.description: Semi-arid reserve known for rare species like the Grevy's zebra and reticulated giraffe.

destinations.name: Lake Nakuru National Park
destinations.description: Rift Valley soda lake famed for flamingo flocks and rhino sanctuaries.

destinations.name: Mount Kenya National Park
destinations.description: Africa's second-highest peak, with glacial valleys and afro-alpine trails.

destinations.name: Watamu
destinations.description: Marine national park with coral reefs, turtle nesting beaches, and deep-sea fishing.

destinations.name: Ruaha National Park
destinations.description: Tanzania's largest park, a remote wilderness with huge elephant and lion populations.

destinations.name: Selous Game Reserve (Nyerere National Park)
destinations.description: One of Africa's largest protected wildernesses, explored by boat, foot, and vehicle.

destinations.name: Lake Manyara National Park
destinations.description: Compact park famed for tree-climbing lions and flocks of flamingos.

destinations.name: Pemba Island
destinations.description: Lush, less-visited island near Zanzibar known for world-class diving.

destinations.name: Mafia Island
destinations.description: Marine park archipelago famous for swimming with whale sharks.

destinations.name: South Luangwa National Park
destinations.description: Birthplace of the walking safari, renowned for leopard sightings.

destinations.name: Lower Zambezi National Park
destinations.description: Riverine wilderness offering canoe safaris beneath towering ana trees.

destinations.name: Kafue National Park
destinations.description: One of the largest parks in the world, with diverse habitats and cheetah populations.

destinations.name: Lusaka
destinations.description: Zambia's bustling capital, a common gateway with markets and cultural sites.

destinations.name: Prison Island (Changuu)
destinations.description: Small island off Stone Town famed for giant Aldabra tortoises and snorkeling reefs.

destinations.name: Nungwi
destinations.description: Zanzibar's lively northern-tip beach village known for nightlife and dhow-building traditions.

destinations.name: Jozani Chwaka Bay National Park
destinations.description: Zanzibar's only national park, home to the rare red colobus monkey.

destinations.name: Aksum
destinations.description: Ancient capital of the Aksumite Empire, home to towering carved obelisks.

destinations.name: Gondar
destinations.description: Former imperial capital known as the 'Camelot of Africa' for its medieval castles.

destinations.name: Danakil Depression
destinations.description: One of the hottest and lowest places on Earth, with acid pools and active lava lakes.

destinations.name: Omo Valley
destinations.description: Culturally diverse region home to numerous indigenous tribes and traditions.

destinations.name: Addis Ababa
destinations.description: Ethiopia's high-altitude capital, blending museums, markets, and coffee culture.

destinations.name: Chefchaouen (The Blue City)
destinations.description: Mountain town famous for its striking blue-washed medina streets.

destinations.name: Casablanca
destinations.description: Morocco's largest city, home to the grand Hassan II Mosque on the Atlantic.

destinations.name: Atlas Mountains (Toubkal Region)
destinations.description: North Africa's highest range, with Berber villages and trekking to Toubkal's summit.

destinations.name: Rabat
destinations.description: Morocco's coastal capital, blending imperial history with a relaxed atmosphere.

destinations.name: Cairo (Islamic & Coptic Quarters)
destinations.description: Sprawling capital packed with medieval mosques, markets, and ancient churches.

destinations.name: Abu Simbel
destinations.description: Massive rock temples built by Ramesses II, relocated to escape flooding.

destinations.description: Classic multi-day cruise past temples, tombs, and riverside villages.

destinations.name: Red Sea Riviera (Hurghada & Sharm El Sheikh)
destinations.description: Premier diving destination with vibrant coral reefs and warm waters.

destinations.name: Siwa Oasis
destinations.description: Remote desert oasis with salt lakes, palm groves, and ancient ruins.

destinations.name: Lalibela
destinations.description: UNESCO site famed for its 12th-century monolithic rock-hewn churches.

Atlas Mountains (Toubkal Region).description: Two-day ascent of North Africa's highest peak.

Cairo (Islamic & Coptic Quarters).description: Explore one of the Middle East's oldest and largest markets.

visaRules.notes: Kenya replaced its visa system with an Electronic Travel Authorization (eTA); apply online before departure.
No visa-on-arrival; apply online, 3-7 working days processing.
Rwanda offers visa on arrival to all nationalities; e-visa also available in advance.
Visa on arrival is also accepted at major airports for most nationalities, but pre-approval online reduces queue time.
Many nationalities are visa-exempt for short tourist stays; verify against your specific passport.
Consider the KAZA UniVisa if also visiting Zimbabwe.
Consider the KAZA UniVisa if also visiting Zambia.
Most nationalities visa-exempt for tourism up to 90 days; verify against your passport.
Most nationalities visa-exempt for short stays; verify against your passport.
e-Visa available online for most nationalities; visa on arrival also offered at some airports.
Many nationalities visa-exempt for tourist stays up to 90 days; verify against your passport.
A free visitor's permit is issued on arrival to all nationalities, subject to proof of accommodation and return ticket.
Visa on arrival available for most nationalities at major entry points; an e-visa option also exists for advance approval.
e-Visa required for most nationalities; apply online in advance, as on-arrival options are limited.
